leakage_audit.group_integrity: All passengers within the same group (GGGG) are kept together in train/val splits

cv_stability_analysis.stability_assessment: GOOD - coefficient of variation = 0.97%, indicating very stable CV performance

target_rate_consistency.assessment: EXCELLENT - all folds have ~50.3% Transported rate, matching overall distribution
target_rate_consistency.conclusion: No group-based class imbalance; stratification is working correctly

expected_cv_range.interpretation: Future models should have CV scores within this range for the same data/group structure. Scores significantly above indicate overfitting; below indicate underfitting or class imbalance.

cv_online_calibration.note: CV score of 0.803 is expected to correlate with online leaderboard performance if the test set follows similar distribution
cv_online_calibration.recommendation: Monitor first submission against CV estimate; if online score << 0.803, investigate distribution shift in test set
